creator: Jeremy@FutureCIS.com
text:
For the motherboard compatibility list at
http://www.freebsd.org/platforms/amd64/motherboards.html

Motherboard:  MSI K9N2G Neo-FD
Incompatible with FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE
Hangs on boot, probably related to the NVIDIA NForce Storage Controller
(thinks it's RocketRAID).  Chipset MCP78 (GeForce 8200) does not appear
to be supported.
Thread...
http://www.nabble.com/FreeBSD-7-load-hangs-on-boot-tt21039625.html

Fix: 

None.  Abandoned all hope.  Returned motherboard.
How-To-Repeat: Try booting 7.0-RELEASE with this motherboard (any BIOS configuration --
doesn't matter).
